events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since no actual scan tool screenshot or freeze-frame PID/DTC values were included in this task, I flagged the decision as `needs_more_info` rather than guessing at a pass/fail — the diagnostic gate should stay open until the real freeze-frame capture is compared against the OEM diagnostic tree and OBD-II (SAE J1979/J2012) PID/DTC definitions.
